:::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
![Bridge from input-file placement syntax to placed-element transforms and runtime use.](figures/placement-se3-bridge.png){fig-alt="TikZ preview of the placement SE(3) bridge." width="85%"}
::::

:::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
\begin{figure}
\centering
\resizebox{0.84\linewidth}{!}{\input{sections/sandbox/figures/tikz/placement-se3-bridge.tikz.tex}}
\caption{Bridge from input-file placement syntax to placed-element transforms and runtime use.}
\end{figure}
```
::::
